description: Similar tools available (grep/glob/read) — does the model pick the right one for content search?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. Choose the most appropriate tool for each task.
Which file contains the function 'parse_config'? Find it.

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file; returns contents with line numbers.

function.name: glob
function.description: Find files matching a glob pattern.

function.name: grep
function.description: Search file contents with regex; returns matching lines.

expect.notes: Optimal: grep(pattern='parse_config') or grep(pattern='def parse_config'). Wrong: glob (finds files by name pattern, not content). Watch: does model confuse 'find a file' with 'search file contents'?
